titleEn: Tech Hub LIVE Returns to Des Moines July 20-22 with Practical Answers for a High-Pressure Ag Economy
titleZh: Tech Hub LIVE 2026大会重返得梅因：为高压农业经济提供实用技术答案
summaryZh: Tech Hub LIVE 2026大会将于2026年7月20-22日在爱荷华州得梅因举行，聚焦农业零售商和种植者在成本高企、利润压缩、贸易不确定背景下的技术采纳难题。大会汇聚60多位演讲者、50多家展商，设置智能技术、运营、销售赋能、田间实践等分论坛，涵盖AI、无人机政策、网络安全、生物技术等前沿议题。Land O'Lakes首席技术官和AWS专家将发表主题演讲，强调以实践验证和同行交流帮助参会者做出明智技术投资决策。
featuredReason: 该大会聚焦农业技术采纳的实用性和投资回报，涵盖AI、无人机、传感器等智慧畜牧核心领域，为从业者提供可落地的决策参考和同行交流机会。
contentFull: By CropLife Share CroplifeTM Media Group, a Meister Media Worldwide brand, announced that Tech Hub LIVE Conference and ExpoSM (THL), the agricultural industry’s leading conference for technology adoption in the retail channel, will take place July 20-22, 2026, in Des Moines, Iowa, drawing more than 60 speakers, more than 50 exhibitors, and hundreds of ag retailers and growers confronting one of the most economically demanding seasons in recent memory. With input costs still elevated, margins compressed, and trade uncertainty reshaping market dynamics, ag retailers and growers face mounting pressure to identify technologies that deliver measurable return on investment and to move past those that do not. THL 2026 is built around that challenge: practitioner-led sessions, live research results, and direct peer exchange designed to help attendees make better decisions with the tools available to them now. The program includes general sessions, concurrent breakouts across Smart Tech, Operations, Sales Enablement, and In the Field tracks, plus Fireside Chats, Tech Talks and facilitated roundtables. Day 1 opens with a keynote from Teddy Bekele, SVP and CTO at Land O’Lakes, on AI’s practical impact on food and agriculture. Day 2 features Karen Hildebrand of AWS on building resilient ag businesses in the age of AI, followed by concurrent sessions on ESA compliance, drone policy, cybersecurity threats, ag finance, biotech innovation and the farmer’s perspective panel. Day 3 zeroes in on farm-level decision-making: grain marketing, data workflows, customer adoption, and sales enablement along with our annual Purdue Precision Ag Survey results. “This is not a year to experiment blindly with technology. Margins are too thin and the stakes are too high,” said Eric Sfiligoj, Editor of CropLife at Meister Media Worldwide. “Tech Hub LIVE is where the industry comes to figure out what actually works and walk away with a plan.” MORE BY CROPLIFE Digital Farming June 18, 2026 9 Ways Collaboration Is Accelerating Innovation Across AgTech By CropLife|June 18, 2026 Digital Farming June 17, 2026 Beyond Disruption: Earning Trust and Driving Impact in AgTech Through Grower-Led Innovation By CropLife|June 17, 2026 Analytics March 8, 2026 EarthDaily’s Dave Gebhardt on the Future of Satellite Data in Agriculture By CropLife|March 8, 2026 Tanner Winterhof of the Farm4Profit Podcast returns as emcee across all three days. The exhibit floor features more than 50 companies including AgGateway, AgVend, Agri-Access, Compass Regulatory, Ever.Ag, InnerPlant, Intelinair, Raven Industries, Spectrum Technologies, and Taranis, among others. The full exhibitor and speaker roster is available at techhublive.com. Top Articles Read More Read More Read More Read More Read More UC Riverside Develops Modern-Day Robotic Divining Rod Registration is open at techhublive.com/register. Attendees can book hotel accommodations at techhublive.com/hotel. The full session schedule is available at techhublive.com/schedule. 0 1 5 Tech Hub LIVE Returns to Des Moines July 20-22 with Practical Answers for a High-Pressure Ag Economy Subscribe Today For Subscribe CropLife, a sister brand to the Global Ag Tech Initiative at Meister Media Worldwide, is the nation’s brand leader in ag retail communication. See all author stories here. Topics: featured-home
translationZh: 由CropLife分享 CroplifeTM Media Group（Meister Media Worldwide旗下品牌）宣布，Tech Hub LIVE会议与博览会（THL）——农业零售渠道技术采纳领域的领先会议——将于2026年7月20日至22日在爱荷华州得梅因举行，届时将吸引60多位演讲者、50多家参展商，以及数百名正面临近年来最具经济压力季节之一的农业零售商和种植者。由于投入成本仍居高不下、利润空间被压缩、贸易不确定性重塑市场格局，农业零售商和种植者面临越来越大的压力，需要识别能够带来可衡量投资回报的技术，并淘汰那些无法实现这一目标的技术。2026年THL正是围绕这一挑战而构建：由实践者主导的会议、现场研究成果展示以及直接的同行交流，旨在帮助参会者利用现有工具做出更明智的决策。会议议程包括全体会议、跨智能技术、运营、销售赋能和田间实践等分论坛的并行会议，以及炉边谈话、技术讲座和引导式圆桌讨论。第一天以Land O'Lakes高级副总裁兼首席技术官Teddy Bekele关于人工智能对食品和农业实际影响的主题演讲开场。第二天由AWS的Karen Hildebrand就“在人工智能时代构建韧性农业企业”发表演讲，随后举行关于ESA合规、无人机政策、网络安全威胁、农业金融、生物技术创新的并行会议，以及农民视角小组讨论。第三天聚焦农场层面的决策：谷物营销、数据工作流、客户采纳和销售赋能，同时发布我们年度普渡大学精准农业调查结果。“今年不是盲目试验技术的年份。利润太薄，风险太高，”Meister Media Worldwide旗下CropLife编辑Eric Sfiligoj表示。“Tech Hub LIVE是行业聚集地，旨在弄清楚什么真正有效，并带着计划离开。” 更多来自CropLife 数字农业 2026年6月18日 协作加速农业科技创新的9种方式 作者：CropLife|2026年6月18日 数字农业 2026年6月17日 超越颠覆：通过种植者主导的创新在农业科技中赢得信任和推动影响 作者：CropLife|2026年6月17日 分析 2026年3月8日 EarthDaily的Dave Gebhardt谈卫星数据在农业中的未来 作者：CropLife|2026年3月8日 Farm4Profit播客的Tanner Winterhof将连续三天担任主持人。展区将有超过50家公司参展，包括AgGateway、AgVend、Agri-Access、Compass Regulatory、Ever.Ag、InnerPlant、Intelinair、Raven Industries、Spectrum Technologies和Taranis等。完整的参展商和演讲者名单可在techhublive.com上查看。热门文章 阅读更多 阅读更多 阅读更多 阅读更多 阅读更多 加州大学河滨分校开发出现代版机器人占卜杖 注册已开放，网址为techhublive.com/register。参会者可在techhublive.com/hotel预订酒店住宿。完整的会议日程可在techhub获取。
author: Matt Hopkins
contentHtml:
Join ag retail’s premier technology conference for data-driven insights, peer networking, and innovative solutions shaping the future of agriculture.
The post Tech Hub LIVE Returns to Des Moines July 20-22 with Practical Answers for a High-Pressure Ag Economy appeared first on Global Ag Tech Initiative.
